body_txt: When robots, computers, and other machines appear in fiction, there are a few common ways for them to be named.  See also A Mech by Any Other Name , Names Given to Computers and Name-Tron . Often a Punny Name . Sub Tropes include A.I.-cronym . If the name expresses or references the robot's function, then it's a Meaningful Name . If the name straightforwardly states the robot's function, then it falls under His Name Really Is "Barkeep" as well.
